overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating a futuristic urban environment. The character moves from a covered industrial underpass through commercial streets with neon signage, past a steam-venting burger restaurant, and stops at a traffic intersection. The scene features towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and a mix of industrial and modern architecture under a bright partly cloudy sky.

agents.ego_description: walking out from under a concrete overpass structure toward the street

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow top walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: large industrial concrete pillars and beams painted teal
vintage blue sports car parked on street
silver sedan parked behind blue car
tall structure with multiple digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks out from under a teal industrial overpass into a sunlit urban street. A pedestrian in yellow passes by on the right as the camera approaches parked vehicles including a distinctive blue sports car. Digital billboards are visible in the distance against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with parked vehicles and digital signage

events.description: character transitions from walking to running
crosses from street to sidewalk on opposite side

agents.ego_description: running along the street past parked cars, then slowing to walk as crossing to the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: man in camouflage jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete wall with colorful graffiti art
tall metal street lamp with orange light fixture

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the street past the parked vehicles, with the teal overpass falling behind. The digital billboard tower grows larger ahead. After crossing the street, the character slows to a walk along a sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and street lamps.

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts and neon signs, observing the commercial area

notable_agents.action: person standing near the neon window display looking at phone

entered.detail: store with large BREWING signage and blue beaded curtain entrance
window with bright pink neon graphics and arrow signs
green building with large burger sculpture on roof, steam rising

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk, the character passes a BREWING shop with blue beaded curtains and vibrant neon pink window displays. Other pedestrians are scattered along the path. In the distance, a distinctive burger restaurant with steam vents becomes visible as the digital billboards recede to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with fast food restaurant and steam vents

events.description: character looks up at the towering skyscrapers and elevated highways

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza while looking around at the architecture and upward at the skyline

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with glass facade dominating the skyline
curved elevated highway structure with vehicles visible above
ground vents releasing white steam near the burger restaurant

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open plaza dominated by the burger restaurant with steam rising from ground vents. The camera pans upward to reveal massive skyscrapers and elevated highway ramps against the sky. The environment feels expansive with the towering architecture overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with traffic and graffiti

events.description: vehicles including a green car and brown truck drive through the intersection
character stops at the curb to wait for passing traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk, attempting to cross the street but stopping for passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving through the intersection
brown pickup truck moving through traffic

entered.detail: large red industrial structure with neon trim in the background
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
colorful graffiti tags painted directly on the street surface

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a busy intersection with colorful graffiti covering the street. Vehicles including a green sports car and brown truck pass through the crosswalk. The character stops at the curb to wait for a gap in traffic, with the elevated highway now visible to the left and a large red industrial building ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded industrial underpass into a sprawling, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins as the character emerges from beneath a teal overpass into the sunlight, passing a pedestrian in yellow and parked vehicles including a blue sports car. As the character runs forward, the teal structure recedes and the scene shifts toward a commercial sidewalk lined with graffiti and a brewing shop featuring vibrant pink neon displays. The path then opens into a wide plaza dominated by a steam-venting burger restaurant, where the camera pans upward to reveal massive skyscrapers and elevated highway ramps against a partly cloudy sky. Finally, the movement leads to a busy, graffiti-covered intersection where the character stops at the curb beside a green sports car and a brown truck, facing a large red industrial building.
